title: New Encounters and Some Misc Changes and Fixes

texts: Added new encounters for the Twining Threads and Nocturnal Sweeping BokGak Intervallos. Updated the relevant theme packs.
Added new encounters for the MD Extreme update. Updated the relevant theme packs.
Added a go back button at the top of posts to go back to the search results.
Added the missing timer to the timers table.
Removed duplicated skills showing up in some identity pages.
Removed view mode from the theme packs page, instead showing both the exclusive gifts and possible bosses at the same time when open.
Adjusted the layout of the modal for displaying gift details on mobile.
Changed links written in markdown to share the same style as the token links.
Changed the current page to be reflected in the URL when navigating pages in search results. This is also to better facilitate the new go back button.
Changed the icon used for timers on the homepage.
Fixed issues on E.G.O pages, icons weren't displaying properly and popular builds tab wasn't sorting builds properly.
Fixed the timer tooltip on the front page using the previous tooltip's timer for a second before updating.
Fixed an issue where clicking tags in search results wouldn't change the selected tag in the search dropdown despite results properly reflecting the newly selected tag.
